reason: jest + ts-jest: unit-test the pure rankMessages() core (term-match ranking, cap, degrade-to-recent when nothing matches, no-usable-terms case). For the flow, mock openai.chat.completions.create to script a searchDiscordMessages tool_call then a final answer, and mock Firestore for searchDiscordMessages.
Verify HttpsError codes (failed-precondition not-logged-in, invalid-argument missing repoId/empty question) and that searchDiscordMessages is best-effort (try/catch → [] + logger.warn, never throws).
Verify v2-only, region asia-east1, secrets:[openaiKey], function-calling via chat.completions.create (not parse), and that the round loop has a bounded MAX_ROUNDS with a forced final answer fallback.

Verify the callable result map is parsed safely into the VM's chat-turn / cited-message types (null-safe field reads, ISO timestamp string handling), and the abstract/live/fake FunctionsService signatures match.
Verify flutter analyze clean (async+mounted guards in the chat input handler, no forbidden deps) and that the Discord tab no longer renders the raw message list per the goal.
Binding branch/commit rules: feature/discord-ai-chat off develop; feature code committed separately from the trellis archive commit; English commit message.
